page_metadata.biotools__summary: The Difference Causal Inference (DCI) algorithm directly learns the difference between two causal graphs given two datasets. DCI is implemented as a part of the causaldag package.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: The Difference Causal Inference (DCI) algorithm directly learns the difference between two causal graphs given two datasets. DCI is implemented as a part of the causaldag package.
